payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Partial tall, narrow white-painted rectangular picture frame with glass pane showing a blurred outdoor scene (trees/building) behind it; vertical orientation, left edge partially occluded by a sheer curtain and crop cuts top and bottom, appears close to the camera (~0.6 m).
attributes: shows blurred outdoor view behind glass

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"narrow white picture frame cropped","long_description":"Partial tall, narrow white-painted rectangular picture frame with glass pane showing a blurred outdoor scene (trees/building) behind it; vertical orientation, left edge partially occluded by a sheer curtain and crop cuts top and bottom, appears close to the camera (~0.6 m).","attributes":["white painted finish","narrow vertical rectangular shape","glass pane present","partial/edge-cropped (top and bottom)","left-side occlusion by sheer curtain","shows blurred outdoor view behind glass"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
